reasoning.question: If all Bloops are Razzies and all Razzies are Lazzies, then all Bloops are definitely Lazzies. True or False?
A train travels 60 km in 1 hour. How long will it take to travel 150 km at the same speed?

situational.question: You have two important deadlines tomorrow, but you can only complete one today. What do you do?
A team member is consistently late with their work, affecting the whole team. How do you handle it?
situational.expected_logic: one-on-one discussion + offer help + escalate if needed

situational.question: You discover a critical bug in a product that is about to be released. What steps do you take?
situational.expected_logic: assess impact → report to manager → discuss with team → propose fix → communicate to stakeholders
